selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 进位, 射程, 运载；vt. 携带, 运送, 支持, 传送, 包含
words.definition: n. the act of carrying something

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 墓穴, 坟墓, 终结, 死亡；a. 庄重的, 严肃的, 重大的, 低沉的
words.definition: n. death of a person

words.translation: n. 旅鸫
words.definition: n. small Old World songbird with a reddish breast

words.translation: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄灭, 漠然, 渴望；vt. 死
words.definition: v. pass from physical life and lose all bodily attributes and functions necessary to sustain life

words.translation: n. 眼睛, 视力, 看；vt. 看, 注视
words.definition: n. the organ of sight

words.translation: n. 苍蝇, 两翼昆虫, 飞行；vi. 飞, 飞翔, 飘扬, 逃走
words.definition: n. two-winged insects characterized by active flight

words.translation: n. 爱, 恋爱, 爱情, 爱好, 性爱；vt. 爱, 爱好, 爱慕
words.definition: n. a strong positive emotion of regard and affection

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 血, 血统, 流血, 气质, 生命；vt. 使出血, 用血涂
words.definition: n. the fluid (red in vertebrates) that is pumped through the body by the heart and contains plasma, blood cells, and platelets

words.translation: n. 死亡
words.definition: n. the event of dying or departure from life

words.translation: n. 鱼, 鱼肉, 鱼类, 接合板；vt. 钓, 钓鱼, 查出, 用接合板连接
words.definition: n. any of various mostly cold-blooded aquatic vertebrates usually having scales and breathing through gills

words.translation: vt. 拉, 拖, 拔, 牵, 撕开, 吸引；vi. 拉, 拖, 拔, 有吸引力
vi. 唱, 唱歌, 演唱, 鸣, 啼；vt. 唱, 歌颂
words.definition: v. deliver by singing

words.translation: n. 领袖, 酋长, 长官, 主要部分；a. 主要的, 首位的
n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 儿子, 女婿, 子孙
words.definition: n. a male human offspring

words.translation: adv. 不久, 早, 快, 宁可
words.definition: r. in the near future

words.translation: n. 铃, 钟
words.definition: n. a hollow device made of metal that makes a ringing sound when struck

words.translation: vt. 挖, 翻土, 发掘；vi. 挖掘
words.definition: v. turn up, loosen, or remove earth

words.translation: n. 盘子, 碟, 菜肴
words.definition: n. a piece of dishware normally used as a container for holding or serving food

words.translation: n. 环, 连结物, 链接, 火把；vt. 连结, 联合, 挽住
words.definition: n. the means of connection between things linked in series

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的
words.definition: n. a mild viral infection involving the nose and respiratory passages (but not the lungs)

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: a. 死的, 不活泼的, 麻木的, 熄灭的；n. 死者
words.definition: a. no longer having or seeming to have or expecting to have life

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: a. 漂亮的, 优美的, 机灵的, 狡猾的, 恰当的；adv. 相当, 颇
words.definition: s. pleasing by delicacy or grace; not imposing

words.translation: n. 办事员, 职员, 文书；vi. 当店员
words.definition: n. an employee who performs clerical work (e.g., keeps records or accounts)

words.translation: a. 勇敢的, 美好的, 华丽的；n. 勇敢者
words.definition: a. possessing or displaying courage; able to face and deal with danger or fear without flinching

words.translation: n. 罚款, 罚金, 晴天, 精细；a. 好的, 晴朗的, 健康的, 细小的, 精细的
words.definition: n. money extracted as a penalty

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 光, 光亮, 灯, 日光, 发光体, 光源, 杰出人物, 火花, 眼光；a. 轻的, 少量的, 轻微的, 轻快的, 轻浮的, 明亮的, 淡色的, 容易的
words.definition: n. (physics) electromagnetic radiation that can produce a visual sensation

words.translation: n. 飞行, 射程, 逃走, 飞跃, 飞机航程, 班机, 迁徙, 飞逝；vi. 迁徙
words.definition: n. a formation of aircraft in flight

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 箭, 箭状物, 箭头记号
words.definition: n. a mark to indicate a direction or relation

words.translation: n. 矮树丛
words.definition: n. a large wilderness area

words.translation: n. 针, 尖；vt. 用针缝
words.definition: n. a slender pointer for indicating the reading on the scale of a measuring instrument

words.translation: n. 取得, 拿, 诡计, 魂；vt. 接来, 取来, 售得, 带来, 推出, 引出, 杀死, 吸引, 到达
words.definition: n. the action of fetching

words.translation: n. 阅读, 知识, 读物；a. 阅读的
words.definition: n. the cognitive process of understanding a written linguistic message

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws

words.translation: n. 分, 分钟, 片刻, 备忘录, 笔记；vt. 记录, 摘录, 测定时间
words.definition: n. a unit of time equal to 60 seconds or 1/60th of an hour

words.translation: n. 公牛
words.definition: n. uncastrated adult male of domestic cattle

words.translation: n. 猫头鹰
words.definition: n. nocturnal bird of prey with hawk-like beak and claws and large head with front-facing eyes

words.translation: n. 弓, 眼睛框；v. 用弓拉琴, 弯成弓形
words.definition: n. a knot with two loops and loose ends; used to tie shoelaces

words.translation: a. 姓氏不详的, 无名的, 无特色的
words.definition: a. having no known name or identity or known source

words.translation: n. 伦敦
words.definition: n. the capital and largest city of England; located on the Thames in southeastern England; financial and industrial and cultural center

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 威廉（男子名）；[常作W-][美俚]钞票, 纸币
